title: Spec Kit: GitHub’s popular toolkit for spec-driven AI-assisted development
friendlyTitle: Spec Kit: write the plan before asking an AI to code
summary: Spec Kit is GitHub’s toolkit for starting spec-driven development projects and currently has about 121,000 stars. It supports multiple coding-agent integrations and received a new release on July 13.
friendlySummary: Spec Kit is a very popular GitHub toolkit that helps you describe what you want to build before an AI coding tool starts changing files.
whyItMatters: Use it to turn a feature idea into an explicit specification and implementation plan before asking a coding agent to make broad changes. That structure can make agent work easier to review, test, and revise.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can help you give an AI coding agent a clearer job, which makes the result easier to check and less likely to wander off on a keyboard adventure.
